files.contents:
[package]
name = "support_ticket_service_candidate"
version = "0.0.0"
edition = "2024"
publish = false

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"

[[bin]]
name = "support-ticket-service-api"
path = "src/bin/api.rs"

[[bin]]
name = "support-ticket-service-worker"
path = "src/bin/worker.rs"

[[bin]]
name = "support-ticket-service-migration"
path = "src/bin/migration.rs"

# support-ticket-service extraction candidate

This scaffold preserves Module `support-ticket` and is bound to `extraction-plan:sha256:60204393c09d750db912068f8fed44a8b959064b84de83b5e7fb6e130905fc0b`.

The linked Host remains authoritative. These API, Worker, and Migration entrypoints validate the candidate shape only; Store expansion and Workload startup belong to the next approved Extraction Plan phase.

Generated Contract bindings live under `generated/bindings/`; only planned cross-Service boundaries receive generated clients under `generated/clients/`. Existing Provider v1 files and behavior are not changed.

openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Support HTTP Service Contract
  version: v1
paths:
  /v1/tickets/{ticket_id}:
    get:
      operationId: getTicket
      x-lenso-idempotency: idempotent
      x-lenso-call-policy:
        maxAttempts: 2
        circuitBreaker: { failureThreshold: 2, openForMs: 1000, halfOpenMaxCalls: 1 }
        concurrency: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        overload: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        fallback:
          handler: support.cached_ticket
          on: [circuit_open, bulkhead_saturated, overload_rejected]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Ticket
        '404':
          description: Standard not-found problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
    post:
      operationId: updateTicket
      x-lenso-idempotency: requires_key
      x-lenso-call-policy:
        maxAttempts: 2
        circuitBreaker: { failureThreshold: 2, openForMs: 1000, halfOpenMaxCalls: 1 }
        concurrency: { maxInFlight: 2 }
        overload: { maxInFlight: 2 }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Updated ticket
        '400':
          description: Standard validation problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
        '409':
          description: Standard conflict problem
          content:
            application/problem+json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
components:
  schemas:
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [type, title, status, detail, code, errors]
      properties:
        type: { type: string }
        title: { type: string }
        status: { type: integer, minimum: 100, maximum: 599 }
        detail: { type: string }
        code: { type: string }
        request_id: { type: [string, 'null'] }
        correlation_id: { type: [string, 'null'] }
        errors: { type: array, items: { type: object } }

# Candidate migrations

The Migration Workload is scaffolded, but this phase does not apply schema or data changes. The expand-first phase must copy the plan-owned migrations from authoritative Module sources and bind receipts to `extraction-plan:sha256:60204393c09d750db912068f8fed44a8b959064b84de83b5e7fb6e130905fc0b`.

Planned Module migrations:
- `0001_create_support_tickets` from `modules/support-ticket/migrations/0001_tickets.sql` (`sha256:da4b3d6540ed81176938a3e19d6f591a33810babd4ade7ba91ed27c4750373ac`)

diff --git a/services/support-ticket-service/contracts/services/support-grpc.v1.proto b/services/support-ticket-service/contracts/services/support-grpc.v1.proto
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/services/support-ticket-service/contracts/services/support-grpc.v1.proto
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+syntax = "proto3";
+
+package lenso.services.support.v1;
+
+// lenso-contract-id: support-grpc
+// lenso-contract-version: v1
+service SupportService {
+  // lenso-idempotency: idempotent
+  // lenso-call-policy: {"maxAttempts":2,"circuitBreaker":{"failureThreshold":2,"openForMs":1000,"halfOpenMaxCalls":1},"concurrency":{"maxInFlight":2},"overload":{"maxInFlight":2},"fallback":{"handler":"support.cached_sla","on":["circuit_open","bulkhead_saturated","overload_rejected","deadline_expired"]}}
+  rpc GetSla(GetSlaRequest) returns (SlaResponse) {
+    option idempotency_level = NO_SIDE_EFFECTS;
+  }
+  // lenso-idempotency: requires_key
+  // lenso-call-policy: {"maxAttempts":2,"circuitBreaker":{"failureThreshold":2,"openForMs":1000,"halfOpenMaxCalls":1},"concurrency":{"maxInFlight":2},"overload":{"maxInFlight":2}}
+  rpc UpdateSla(UpdateSlaRequest) returns (SlaResponse);
+  // lenso-call-policy: {"maxAttempts":1,"circuitBreaker":{"failureThreshold":2,"openForMs":1000,"halfOpenMaxCalls":1},"concurrency":{"maxInFlight":2},"overload":{"maxInFlight":2}}
+  rpc ProbeSla(ProbeSlaRequest) returns (SlaResponse);
+}
+
+message GetSlaRequest { bytes payload = 1; }
+message UpdateSlaRequest { bytes payload = 1; }
+message ProbeSlaRequest { bytes payload = 1; }
+message SlaResponse { bytes payload = 1; }

new file mode 100644

+++ b/services/support-ticket-service/generated/bindings/support-ticket-http-v1-v1-server.json
@@ -0,0 +1,309 @@
+{
+  "contractId": "support-ticket-http.v1",
+  "operations": [
+    {
+      "callPolicy": {
+        "circuitBreaker": {
+          "failureThreshold": 2,
+          "halfOpenMaxCalls": 1,
+          "openForMs": 1000

+        "concurrency": {

+        },

+      },

+      "operationId": "getTicket",
+      "path": "/v1/tickets/{ticket_id}",
+      "responseSchemas": {

+              "type": "string"
+            },
+            "correlation_id": {
+              "type": [

+                "null"
+              ]
+            },
+            "detail": {
+              "type": "string"
+            },
+            "errors": {
+              "items": {
+                "type": "object"
+              },
+              "type": "array"
+            },
+            "request_id": {
+              "type": [
+                "string",
+                "null"
+              ]
+            },
+            "status": {
+              "maximum": 599,
+              "minimum": 100,
+              "type": "integer"
+            },
+            "title": {
+              "type": "string"
+            },
+            "type": {
+              "type": "string"
+            }
+          },
+          "required": [
+            "type",
+            "title",
+            "status",
+            "detail",

diff --git a/services/support-ticket-service/migrations/README.md b/services/support-ticket-service/migrations/README.md
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/services/support-ticket-service/migrations/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Candidate migrations
+
+The Migration Workload is scaffolded, but this phase does not apply schema or data changes. The expand-first phase must copy the plan-owned migrations from authoritative Module sources and bind receipts to `extraction-plan:sha256:60204393c09d750db912068f8fed44a8b959064b84de83b5e7fb6e130905fc0b`.
+
+Planned Module migrations:
+- `0001_create_support_tickets` from `modules/support-ticket/migrations/0001_tickets.sql` (`sha256:da4b3d6540ed81176938a3e19d6f591a33810babd4ade7ba91ed27c4750373ac`)

diff --git a/services/support-ticket-service/src/lib.rs b/services/support-ticket-service/src/lib.rs
new file mode 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/services/support-ticket-service/src/lib.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+//! Generated extraction candidate. The linked Module remains authoritative.
+
+pub const SERVICE_ID: &str = "support-ticket-service";
+pub const MODULE_ID: &str = "support-ticket";
+pub const LINKED_AUTHORITY_REMAINS_AUTHORITATIVE: bool = true;
+pub const MODULE_MANIFEST_JSON: &str = include_str!("../lenso.module.json");
+pub const SERVICE_MANIFEST_JSON: &str = include_str!("../lenso.service.json");
+
+#[must_use]
+pub fn validate_public_entrypoints() -> bool {
+    !SERVICE_ID.is_empty()
+        && !MODULE_ID.is_empty()
+        && LINKED_AUTHORITY_REMAINS_AUTHORITATIVE
+        && !MODULE_MANIFEST_JSON.is_empty()
+        && !SERVICE_MANIFEST_JSON.is_empty()
+}
